---
title: "Export results from fnt-tracer"
output: html_document
---

# 1. split the combined FNT file into files storing individual neuron
```{bash eval=FALSE}
mkdir split
fnt-split tracing.fnt -o split
```

In the folder split, FNT files started with JUNK denote the segment reconstructed in FNT-tracer without soma bodies.

# 2. convert FNT format to SWC format
Fast Neurite Tracer (FNT) stores the tracing results into the FNT format. Since SWC format is widely used, we convert the FNT file into SWC file.

```{bash eval=FALSE}
fnt-to-swc 0000.fnt 0000.swc
```
